opinion.h: HOLDEN ET AL. v. ARNEBERGH, CITY ATTORNEY OF LOS ANGELES, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 945. Decided March 3, 1969.
opinion.p: 265 Cal. App. 2d 87, 71 Cal. Rptr. 401, appeal dismissed.
Roger Arnebergh, pro se, and Robert B. Burns for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed, it appearing that the judgment below rests upon an adequate state ground.
